title: Insert null second interval value results in 0
poc: CREATE TABLE testnullsb (g INTERVAL minute to second);
key_bug_features: Insert null value into INTERVAL column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testnullsb (g INTERVAL minute to second, h INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO testnullsb (g, h) VALUES (INTERVAL '1:30' MINUTE TO SECOND, 2);
SELECT g, h FROM testnullsb WHERE h IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM testnullsb WHERE g IS NULL;
